form.formComment: Won by a head when driven back in the field, (Fr3) held up early, at this track (2:44.10) beating Satan Princess in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on February 27 at $9. Two runs back 3rd (Fr2) over 2277m after showing early speed at Williams beaten 6 m by Elephant Rock (2:52.40) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on February 22 at $8. Will find this assignment a lot tougher.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Fr6) over 2100m after showing early speed and racing wide at Bunbury beaten 65 m by Island Tee Rex (2:35.80) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on March 28 at $23. At his previous start 4th (Fr2) over 2190m after showing early speed at Bridgetown beaten 2.25 m by Ta In Advance (2:47.50) in 4yo+ NR up to 69 on March 22 at $3. Has ability and can do much better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly during the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing fifth behind Mister Kopa at this track over 2190m in a 4yo+ NR up to 65 on February 27 at $18. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing third after being driven well back, behind The Righteous at Gloucester Park over 2130m in a 4yo+ NR up to 60 on March 6 at $20. Heading the right way and is a leading player.
